description: Construct a Reuleaux triangle in GeoGebra using vertices A = (0, 0), B = (4, 0), and C = (2, 2*sqrt(3)). The triangle's boundary must consist of three circular arcs, each connecting two vertices and centered at the third. Include a text annotation containing the phrase 'constant width' in the view. Save the construction to ~/Documents/GeoGebra/projects/reuleaux_triangle.ggb.
